info.title: Automatica.Core CLI Version
info.description:
Usage - automatica-cli <action> -options
GlobalOption    Description
Help (--help)   Shows CLI info
Actions
SetVersion <Version> -options - sets version in all *.csproj files found in the current working directory
Option                  Description
Version* (-V)           The version to set
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
NugetUpdate -options - Updates all automatica.core nuget references found in the current working directory
Option                  Description
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
MigrateDatabase <SourceDatabaseType> <SourceDatabaseConnectionString> <TargetDatabaseType> <TargetDatabaseConnectionString>  - Migrates the database content from source to target
Option                                  Description
SourceDatabaseType* (-S)                Source database type
SQLite
MariaDb
SourceDatabaseConnectionString* (-So)   Source database connection string
TargetDatabaseType* (-T)                Target database type
SQLite
MariaDb
TargetDatabaseConnectionString* (-Ta)   Target database connection stringe
GitCommitPush <Comment> -options - Commits and pushes all git repositories found in the current working directory
Option                  Description
Comment* (-C)           Comment
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
Init -options - Initializes the project in the current working directory
Option                  Description
Type* (-T)              The type of plugin, either Driver or Rule
ProjectFullName (-P)
PluginGuid (-Pl)
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
Publish [<Rid>] [<Configuration>] [<OutputDirectory>] -options - Publishes the project and all dependencies to a specific directory
Option                  Description
Rid (-R)                The runtime identifier [Default='']
Configuration (-C)      Build configuration [Default='Debug']
OutputDirectory (-O)    Publish output directory [Default='publish']
IgnoreManifest (-I)
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
Deploy [<TargetDirectory>] [<PublishDirectory>] -options - Deploys only the needed files to a specific directory
Option                  Description
TargetDirectory (-T)    The target directiry [Default='deploy']
PublishDirectory (-P)   The publish directory [Default='publish']
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
GenerateProject <Type> <ShortName> <FullName> [<OverwriteExisting>] -options - Generates a new Automatica driver or rule project
Option                   Description
Type* (-T)               The type of the new project. Either driver or rule
[Default='driver']
ShortName* (-S)          The name of the new project
FullName* (-F)           The name of the new project
OverwriteExisting (-O)   Option to overwrite an existing destination folder
[Default='False']
WorkingDirectory (-W)    The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
Pack -options - Packs a Automatica driver or rule project
Option                     Description
Version* (-V)              The package version
Rid (-R)                   The rid to build
Configuration (-C)         The package configuration [Default='Release']
OutputDirectory (-O)       The package output directory, if not set the
working directory will be used
UpdateNugetPackages (-U)   Defines if you want to automatically update all
your Automatica.Core nuget references
[Default='True']
WorkingDirectory (-W)      The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
DeployPlugin <File> <ApiKey> <CloudUrl> <DeleteOldVersions> <CloudEnvironment>  - Deploys a Automatica driver or rule project to the cloud
Option                    Description
File* (-F)                The package file
ApiKey* (-A)              The cloud api key
CloudUrl* (-C)            The cloud url
DeleteOldVersions* (-D)   Define if the old versions should be deleted
[Default='True']
CloudEnvironment* (-Cl)   Sets the cloud environment for the plugin
[Default='develop']
PackUpdate -options - Packages a Automatica.Core update
Option                    Description
Version* (-V)             The package version
Rid* (-R)                 The package rid
PreRelease (-P)           Defines if the update is a pre-release
[Default='False']
Configuration* (-C)       The package configuration [Default='Release']
UpdateOutput* (-U)        The path where the generated update file should be
stored
PreBuiltDirectory (-Pr)   If the sources are already built, use this
paramater to define where the binaries are
WorkingDirectory (-W)     The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
DeployUpdate <File> <ApiKey> <CloudUrl> <CloudEnvironment>  - Deploys a Automatica.Core update to the cloud
Option                    Description
File* (-F)                The update file
ApiKey* (-A)              The cloud api key
CloudUrl* (-C)            The cloud url
CloudEnvironment* (-Cl)   Sets the cloud environment for the update
[Default='develop']
DeployDockerUpdate <ImageName> <ImageTag> <Version> <ApiKey> <CloudUrl> <CloudEnvironment>  - Deploys a docker Automatica.Core update to the cloud
Option                    Description
ImageName* (-I)           The image name
ImageTag* (-Im)           The image tag
Version* (-V)             The image version
ApiKey* (-A)              The cloud api key
CloudUrl* (-C)            The cloud url
CloudEnvironment* (-Cl)   Sets the cloud environment for the update
[Default='develop']
MigrateManifest -options - Migrates manifest to the latest version
Option                  Description
SearchRecursive (-S)    Search recursive for automatica-manifest.json files
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
InstallLatestPlugins <InstallDirectory> <MinCoreServerVersion> <ApiKey> <CloudUrl> <CloudEnvironment>  - Install latest plugins
Option                       Description
InstallDirectory* (-I)       Install directory
MinCoreServerVersion* (-M)   The min required core server version
ApiKey* (-A)                 The cloud api key
CloudUrl* (-C)               The cloud url
CloudEnvironment* (-Cl)      The cloud environment [Default='develop']
SetMinCoreServerVersionInManifests <Version> -options - Set min core server verison in plugin manifests
Option                  Description
Version* (-V)           The version to set
SearchRecursive (-S)    Search recursive for automatica-manifest.json files
WorkingDirectory (-W)   The working directory, if not set the current
working directory will be used
PrintRid  - Prints the current RID to the stdout
InstallPlugin [<PluginFile>] [<InstallDirectory>]  - Installs a plugin in a give directory
Option                  Description
PluginFile (-P)         The plugin file
InstallDirectory (-I)   The install directory
